# Saurabh Verma

> Full-Stack Software Engineer & Product Builder building practical apps that solve real problems.

## Overview

Saurabh Verma is a software engineer at Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) with expertise in building modern full-stack web and mobile applications. His work spans health-tech, SaaS platforms, real-time collaboration tools, and developer utilities — all designed to be privacy-first, performant, and user-friendly.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Next.js
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express, Fastify, Socket.IO, WebRTC
- **Mobile:** Flutter, Dart, Firebase
- **Data:** MySQL, SQLite, Firebase, Google Drive API
- **DevOps:** Docker, Nginx, Certbot, Oracle Cloud, Vercel, Netlify
- **AI/ML:** OCR (ML Kit), TensorFlow Lite, Gemini integration

## Experience

- **Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)** — Assistant System Engineer (2022–present)
  - Full-stack development for enterprise clients
  - Built and maintained production systems at scale
- Previously worked on hospital management, financial reconciliation, and insurance claim processing systems

## Notable Projects

- [AyuSense](https://ayusense.skverma.in) — Privacy-first offline family health records app with on-device OCR, medicine alarms, and milestone tracking. Flutter + SQLite + Firebase.
- [Gariva](https://gariva.skverma.in) — SaaS garage management platform for Indian workshops. Job cards, billing, inventory, staff management. React + Fastify + MySQL.
- [meetIO](https://meet.skverma.in) — Real-time video conferencing with screen sharing. React + WebRTC + Socket.IO.
- [Vivah](https://vivah.skverma.in) — Wedding planning SaaS for Indian families. Guest management, venue coordination, task lists, vendor tracking.
- [Bingo Extended](https://bingo.skverma.in) — Real-time multiplayer bingo with custom rules. React + Socket.IO.
- [Surabhi Art Gallery](https://art.skverma.in) — E-commerce platform for handmade art and crafts.
- [GoogleThat4U](https://googlethat4u.skverma.in) — LMGTFY-style search redirect tool.
